title: I act boldly and trust myself
subtitle: A present-tense affirmation for when the fear of the wrong move is louder than the pull of the right one.
excerpt: A short affirmation from Day 44 of the MONEY program. For when analysis has become a substitute for action.
sourceNotes: Adapted from Day 44 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).

content.text: A short affirmation from Day 44 of the MONEY program. The pattern it addresses: analysis as a holding pattern, every angle examined, nothing moved. This line reinstates trust in your own judgment.
I allow courage, clarity, and trust to guide my actions around money and success.
Say it three times. The third pass, slow it down, the words "courage, clarity, and trust" each carry a different weight.
Adapted from Day 44 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).
